LanguageData.ABY_CraftUnstableBreachSigil.description: Forge a crude breach sigil for the first hostile rehearsal pattern. It opens a smaller early rift that teaches the summon loop before the first boss tier.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftArchonSigil.description: Forge an archon-class sigil from hardened abyssal matter. This records the right to reproduce a more serious encounter protocol.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshboundCapacitorModule.descrip: Fabricate a low-tier capacitor module able to hold the first disciplined charge states of the summoning circle.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownCondenserModule.descriptio: Build a crown-grade condenser module for the heaviest ritual loads and the most dangerous circle states.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownStabilizerModule.descripti: Assemble a crown-tier stabilizer meant for severe containment duty during late ritual work.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrudeStabilizerModule.descripti: Construct a primitive stabilizer frame to keep early summon geometry from tearing outward too violently.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftDominionSigil.description: Assemble the sigil required to begin a dominion-class breach. This is less a key than a signed declaration that the colony is willing to escalate.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftEmberHoundSigil.description: Bind the ember hound pattern into a reusable sigil and make that fast predatory breach rite available on demand.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftResidue.description: Condense raw infernal traces into a stable stock of abyssal residue suitable for forging, ritual fuel and deeper progression.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftResonantStabilizerModule.descri: Fabricate a tuned stabilizer lattice that distributes gate stress through resonance instead of brute failure.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftCapacitorModule.description: Forge a mid-tier capacitor module tuned for reshaping unstable ritual load into reusable breach current.
LanguageData.ABY_InstallArchonTendonSpine.description: Install an archon-pattern tendon spine to increase movement, handling and battlefield stability.
LanguageData.ABY_InstallHeraldCarapaceMesh.descriptio: Thread a herald carapace mesh under the skin and teach flesh to accept abyssal-grade reinforcement.
LanguageData.ABY_InstallHeraldEye.description: Implant a herald-grade ocular unit and replace ordinary sight with boss-derived acquisition logic.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftWardenOfAshSigil.description: Forge an overseer-grade sigil keyed to the first ash mini-boss. This ritual pattern fills the gap between early rehearsal breaches and the first archon-class encounter.
